title: rclaude project configuration
description: Per-project configuration for rclaude sessions. Place at .claude/rclaude.json in your project root.

permissions.description: Auto-approve rules for Write/Edit permission requests on protected directories (.claude/, .git/, etc). Only Write and Edit are supported - all other tool permissions are handled by Claude Code's own permission system.

allow.description: Glob patterns matching relative file paths from the project root. Use ** for recursive directory matching. Example: .claude/docs/** allows all files under .claude/docs/
